languages.text: "Значит, этот мир — арсенал? Первый Призыв вломился на древний склад биооружия? Восхитительно. И иронично".
"So the entire world is an arsenal? The First Call-Up broke into an ancient bioweapons depot? That's fantastic. And ironic."
languages.original_text: "Значит, этот мир — арсенал? Первый Призыв вломился на древний склад биооружия? Восхитительно. И иронично".

traits.locale_text: "So the entire world is an arsenal? The First Call-Up broke into an ancient bioweapons depot? That's fantastic. And ironic."
"So the entire world is an arsenal? The First Call-Up broke into an ancient bioweapons depot? That's fantastic. And ironic."
"So the entire world is an arsenal? The First Call-Up broke into an ancient bioweapons depot? That's fantastic. And ironic."

languages.text: 「つまり、世界全体が兵器庫なの？そして、ファーストコールアップが古代の生物兵器庫に侵入したの？それは素晴らしい。そして皮肉だ」
languages.original_text: "So the entire world is an arsenal? The First Call-Up broke into an ancient bioweapons depot? That's fantastic. And ironic."

traits.locale_text: 「つまり、世界全体が兵器庫なの？そして、ファーストコールアップが古代の生物兵器庫に侵入したの？それは素晴らしい。そして皮肉だ。」

languages.text: «¿De modo que el mundo al completo es un arsenal? ¿Los primeros llamados entraron en un antiguo depósito de armas biológicas? Es fantástico. E irónico».
languages.original_text: "So the entire world is an arsenal? The First Call-Up broke into an ancient bioweapons depot? That's fantastic. And ironic."

traits.locale_text: «¿De modo que el mundo al completo es un arsenal? ¿Los primeros llamados entraron en un antiguo depósito de armas biológicas? Es fantástico. E irónico».

languages.text: “所以整个星球就是一座军火库？初代征召者闯入的是一座远古生化武器库？太妙了，太讽刺了。”
languages.original_text: "So the entire world is an arsenal? The First Call-Up broke into an ancient bioweapons depot? That's fantastic. And ironic."

traits.locale_text: “所以整个星球就是一座军火库？初代征召者闯入的是一座远古生化武器库？太妙了，太讽刺了。”

languages.text: "Dann ist die ganze Welt ein Arsenal? Die Erste Einberufung ist in ein altes Biowaffen-Depot eingebrochen? Das ist ja fantastisch. Und ironisch."
languages.original_text: "So the entire world is an arsenal? The First Call-Up broke into an ancient bioweapons depot? That's fantastic. And ironic."

traits.locale_text: "Dann ist die ganze Welt ein Arsenal? Die Erste Einberufung ist in ein altes Biowaffen-Depot eingebrochen? Das ist ja fantastisch. Und ironisch."

languages.text: "Yani tüm dünya bir cephanelik mi? İlk Sevk Grubu, kadim bir biyosilah deposuna mı girmiş? Ne harika... Ve de ironik."
languages.original_text: "So the entire world is an arsenal? The First Call-Up broke into an ancient bioweapons depot? That's fantastic. And ironic."

traits.locale_text: "Yani tüm dünya bir cephanelik mi? İlk Sevk Grubu, kadim bir biyosilah deposuna mı girmiş? Ne harika... Ve de ironik."

languages.text: « Ainsi, la planète tout entière est un immense arsenal ? La Première Mobilisation a donc fait irruption dans un ancien dépôt d'armes biologiques ? C'est à la fois formidable... et ironique. »
languages.original_text: "So the entire world is an arsenal? The First Call-Up broke into an ancient bioweapons depot? That's fantastic. And ironic."

traits.locale_text: « Ainsi, la planète tout entière est un immense arsenal ? La Première Mobilisation a donc fait irruption dans un ancien dépôt d'armes biologiques ? C'est à la fois formidable... et ironique. »
